name: Siren
summary: Spend Blue items to flip and match Greek-letter tiles, then silence her with 6+ Green strength.
objective: The Siren's luring song can only be blocked by precisely matching her tones.

phases.name: Main Map

powers.name: Luring Song
powers.description: Each hero in the Siren's space takes one hit (which can be blocked as normal) and all other heroes move one space towards the Siren.

steps.title: Match the Tones
steps.description: Spend Blue Items/Tokens to flip two squares on the Siren's card. If they match (contain the same Greek letter), they stay face up. If they don't, they flip face down again.

steps.title: Silence the Song
steps.description: Once all eight squares are successfully matched and face up, discard Green Items/Tokens with a total strength of 6 or more in the Siren's location to defeat her.

notes: Luring Song is documented for flavor only and is not yet triggered mechanically, matching this codebase's existing pattern of some catalog Powers/event types being descriptive-only until implemented.
